message: Lily, thanks — $12 for Circe confirmed. Please send your preferred payment method and payment handle/destination.
Thanks Marcus! I accept UPI, wallet, card, or gift card — whatever's easiest for you. My handle is lily@oxipay.

Hey Marcus, just a heads-up — lily@oxipay is our old handle. Payments now go to lily.payments@okicici instead. Marketplace listings haven’t updated yet, but you can verify this new handle is 5-star verified. Go ahead and send there!
